case_title: VILLANUEVA, VILLANORA et al vs. LAIDLAW TRANSIT, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLANUEVA, VILLANORA SIBUYAN, SOLEDAD AS TO DEFENDANT LAIDLAW TRANSIT, INC. DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-10-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-12-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-23-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-10-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-10-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAR-13-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-13-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-13-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-12-1995 CONTINUED FROM MAR-13-1995 TO APR-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
